# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: users
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: users
    tier: backend
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: users
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: users
        tier: backend
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: users
          image: ghcr.io/example/users:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: PORT
              value: "8080"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: orders
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: orders
    tier: backend
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: orders
        tier: backend
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: orders
          image: ghcr.io/example/orders:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: PORT
              value: "8080"
            - name: USERS_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://users.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8080"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 150m
              memory: 192Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 700m
              memory: 768Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payments
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payments
    tier: backend
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payments
        tier: backend
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: payments
          image: ghcr.io/example/payments:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: PORT
              value: "8080"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 150m
              memory: 192Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 700m
              memory: 768Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend
    tier: frontend
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
        tier: frontend
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: ghcr.io/example/frontend:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: PORT
              value: "8080"
            - name: ORDERS_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://orders.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8080"
            - name: PAYMENTS_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://payments.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8080"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-worker
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: batch-worker
    tier: worker
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-worker
        tier: worker
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: batch-worker
          image: ghcr.io/example/batch-worker:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          env:
            - name: RUN_INTERVAL_SECONDS
              value: "60"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 50m
              memory: 64Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
